name: Copilot + GitHub CLI
description: Runner workload for GitHub CLI and Copilot CLI sessions with shared auth state.

authMounts.name: agent-home
authMounts.description: Persist GitHub and agent CLI auth/config state.

cacheMounts.description: Persist npm package downloads used by agent tooling.

secrets.name: github-token
secrets.description: Optional token for non-interactive GitHub auth flows.
